mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hd_demo ( initiate_date, task_id, name, task_level, type, handler, handler_phone, due_day, status, start_date, complete_status, execu_node, group_name, comment_conet, accident_id ) VALUES
( #{item.initiateDate}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.name}, #{item.taskLevel}, #{item.type}, #{item.handler}, #{item.handlerPhone}, #{item.dueDay}, #{item.status}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.completeStatus}, #{item.execuNode}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.commentConet}, #{item.accidentId} )
